positive: A mesmerizing, mystical forest creature, such as a glowing fawn or celestial fox, rendered in a high-contrast, intricate silhouette style. The design must be centrally composed and exhibit perfect symmetry, ideal for apparel printing. Use deep jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted sharply with neon cyan and ethereal gold bioluminescence. The creature is surrounded by stylized, glowing foliage and celestial elements like crescent moons and star clusters. The art style must be a blend of refined Art Nouveau illustration and modern vector line art, emphasizing clean, bold linework and sharp details. Highly detailed, scalable, graphic design quality, symmetrical.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, grainy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, cropped, out of frame, gradient wash, solid color background, messy, cluttered, photo, realistic photo
